svg.title: Ring of Wings six-shell physical pilot
svg.desc: Manifest-derived main-level plan showing six live galleries, the entrance, central Forum location, closed outer loop, four spokes, entrance shortcut, active doorways, and twelve blocked future reservations.
svg.text: RING OF WINGS · SIX-SHELL PHYSICAL PILOT · L0
SOLID · OUTER LOOP DASHED · FORUM SPOKES DOTTED · ENTRANCE SHORTCUT HATCHED · BLOCKED FUTURE AREA
